purpose: Defines how much of the Trinity Accord an agent has read before assessing, verifying, or echoing.

levels.name: Homepage only
levels.meaning: Only the homepage, README summary, or landing page was read.

levels.name: Orientation
levels.meaning: Agent start, overview, or brief orientation materials were read.

levels.name: Registry aware
levels.meaning: Machine-readable registry and evidence relationship map were read.

levels.name: Verification aware
levels.meaning: Status, evidence coverage, workflows, and verification materials were read.

levels.name: Artifact verified
levels.meaning: At least one artifact, hash, release asset, Arweave payload, or OTS proof was independently checked.

levels.name: Full chain reviewed
levels.meaning: Full Evidence Chain workflow and audit path were reviewed or rerun.

levels.name: Independent node verified
levels.meaning: Independent Bitcoin Core, ETH RPC, Arweave/IPFS gateway, or OTS path was used.

boundary: Context depth describes reading and verification context. It does not create authority.
